title: Canadian Savory Fries
description: A delicious Canadian-inspired savory fries dish.
instructions: Line a baking sheet with parchment paper and spread the fries on it.
Sprinkle the fry seasoning over the fries and toss to coat.
Bake in the preheated oven for 20 minutes, or until crispy.
In a saucepan, heat the vegetable oil over medium heat.
Add the diced onion and sauté until translucent.
Add the savory gravy mix and stir to combine.
Pour the hot gravy mixture over the baked fries and toss to coat.
